summary: Clear, decent‑quality recording (with a few rough spots) of a solid Grateful Dead show.
review: Both reviewers describe the performance as a good show and praise the clarity of this particular copy, noting it is the best‑sounding among the six available tapes. The recording includes historical radio announcements and eliminates dead‑air tuning segments, though a few rough moments are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed reviews give consistent 4–5 star ratings, highlighting both a solid musical performance and clear audio with only minor roughness.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear recording; includes historical radio announcement; excludes dead‑air tuning tracks; some rough spots noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers simply note the show is solid and enjoyable.
